lead.description: top of page ![SCC Logo](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/04163d_f51b14ce05414da59f57977f81c2b3e4~mv2.png/v1/crop/x_92,y_301,w_914,h_522/fill/w_110,h_64,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/04163d_f51b14ce05414da59f57977f81c2b3e4~mv2.png) * [Home](https://www.startupconsultingatcornell.org) * [Services](https://www.startupconsultingatcornell.org/service) * [Team](https://www.startupconsultingatcornell.org/team2026) * [Join Us](https://www.startupconsultingatcornell.org/join-us) * More Use tab to navigate through the menu items. ![Untitled design \(1\).png](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/04163d_000128b035e745cc8dfae68655d171d5~mv2.png/v1/fill/w_1242,h_768,al_b,q_90,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/04163d_000128b035e745cc8dfae68655d171d5~mv2.png) Startups Grow Here, So Do You # Startup Consulting at Cornell [View Our Services](https://www.startupconsultingatcornell.org/service) ![SCC driven by growth](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/04163d_17d93db9257f4a308b8857e4904365f3~mv2.png/v1/crop/x_0,y_167,w_1920,h_749/fill/w_807,h_315,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/SCC%20Working%20Slide.png) Startup Consulting at Cornell is an undergraduate organization that partners with startups at all stages to solve real business challenges — from market entry strategies to product positioning. Our members gain hands-on consulting experience, a deep understanding of entrepreneurship, and direct exposure to the startup ecosystem. We operate pro bono, driven by a passion for innovation and impact. # Our Slogan Client-focused: We help startups of all stages overcome their biggest challenges, whether breaking into new markets, refining their value proposition, or building competitive advantage. Our teams bring fresh perspectives, data-driven insights, and creative strategies that help startups grow faster and smarter. ![SCC Slogan](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/04163d_b001451a7a144f4a987a7e824713301a~mv2.png/v1/crop/x_201,y_355,w_1476,h_380/fill/w_566,h_146,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/7.png) Member-focused: Every project is a learning lab, where you sharpen problem-solving skills, gain startup industry exposure, and develop professional capabilities. From training in consulting frameworks to leading client engagements, members grow into confident, impactful professionals. # Our Mission and Goal ![SCC Member Pic 1](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/04163d_0af8da35f3e844af828f4793eb2f41c3~mv2.jpg/v1/crop/x_735,y_0,w_2000,h_2000/fill/w_259,h_259,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Group%20Pic%201_edited.jpg) # WHY SCC (Mission) Startup Consulting at Cornell exists to accelerate the growth of startups while cultivating the next generation of entrepreneurial leaders. ​​ We believe that by empowering startups to overcome their toughest challenges, we ​ i) Create opportunities for our members to gain real-world experience in startups ii) Build lasting connections iii) Develop the skills to thrive in a fast-changing world with entrepreneurial mindsets. # HOW We Achieve (Goal) Our goal is to deliver high-impact, pro-bono consulting to startups across diverse industries, tackling challenges such as market entry, competitive positioning, product development, and growth strategy. ​ Through these projects, we equip our members with hands-on consulting experience, entrepreneurial thinking, and access to a vibrant network of founders, investors, and alumni — because when startups grow here, so do you. ![SCC Member Pic 2](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/04163d_938bdb615b864986ad29d441ee61c4f9~mv2.jpg/v1/crop/x_315,y_0,w_2000,h_2000/fill/w_273,h_273,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Group%20Pic%202_edited.jpg) ![SCC Working Slide \(4\).png](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/04163d_31b62419562d4c40a5794c4e26d3bfc9~mv2.png/v1/fill/w_44,h_25,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,blur_2,enc_avif,quality_auto/04163d_31b62419562d4c40a5794c4e26d3bfc9~mv2.png) ![SCC Pillar 1](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/04163d_a5314683d2f54ceea596cee5daba9832~mv2.png/v1/crop/x_89,y_332,w_419,h_415/fill/w_131,h_130,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/SCC%20Working%20Slide%20\(5\).png) ![SCC Pillar 3](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/04163d_a5314683d2f54ceea596cee5daba9832~mv2.png/v1/crop/x_735,y_316,w_450,h_451/fill/w_141,h_141,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/SCC%20Working%20Slide%20\(5\).png) ![SCC Pillar 2](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/04163d_a5314683d2f54ceea596cee5daba9832~mv2.png/v1/crop/x_1412,y_332,w_428,h_419/fill/w_134,h_131,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/SCC%20Working%20Slide%20\(5\).png) # Startup Centric Impact # Creative Founder Mindset # Connected Ecosystem We collaborate directly with startups at all stages to address their most pressing challenges, crafting innovative and actionable solutions that drive measurable growth. We approach each project with a founder’s mindset — applying creativity, resilience, and multidisciplinary expertise to help startups grow, while empowering our members to think like entrepreneurs in fast-paced environments. We cultivate a connected ecosystem where members learn from experienced peers, engage with alumni, and collaborate with startup founders, creating a network that accelerates both startup success and member development. # Our Partners and Collaborators ![SCC Stakeholders & Collaborators](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/04163d_5ecc1ffefa5b498f9fea54f04a990e60~mv2.png/v1/crop/x_5,y_117,w_1911,h_870/fill/w_817,h_372,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/15.png) # Our Alumni Placement ![SCC Alumni Placement](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/04163d_7d7359203e5f4dba9f3bf3b3bd250443~mv2.png/v1/crop/x_0,y_47,w_1920,h_873/fill/w_817,h_372,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/17.png) ## ​ ​ ![Applications for SCC are due TONIGHT! Please be sure to apply through the link in our bio. We look forward to reading your applications!](https://scontent-iad6-1.cdninstagram.com/v/t51.82787-15/628329839_18043035992724477_3144587870126005319_n.jpg?stp=dst-jpg_e35_tt6&_nc_cat=100&ccb=7-5&_nc_sid=18de74&efg=eyJlZmdfdGFnIjoiRkVFRC5iZXN0X2ltYWdlX3VybGdlbi5DMiJ9&_nc_ohc=d1Afsw9P5nwQ7kNvwGbk0-D&_nc_oc=AdotcHGh1piydDUSP6QZwysIH7CT4QB7Px8nAuZS9dfQEz-LvXN6qLlh25fpUZR-waA&_nc_zt=23&_nc_ht=scontent-iad6-1.cdninstagram.com&edm=ANo9K5cEAAAA&_nc_gid=erlJ7eY4vyX9gQuLAlzDzA&_nc_tpa=Q5bMBQEqYSJCOXMO09c2gS0-4aM0zoAg80QqpC1OOFJPad5q4O3xJ_0477uV6Xbcj97euB1D8tL5pyK6&oh=00_AfwJXD0JEE8KuTBWGR8L1nmjzXTbXkWNKw034Kg7UmkBWw&oe=69CB2D63)![Applications for SCC are due TONIGHT!
